theme_notes: Taglines drawn from the 2026 FIFA World Cup Final preview (Argentina vs. Spain, Sunday at MetLife — Messi faces the baby from his old ad), the US-Iran war entering its sixth consecutive night of airstrikes with the ceasefire collapsed and Qatar/Kuwait also under fire, and the CDC-traced parasite outbreak linked to Taco Bell lettuce.
settled: Balanced. Unlike the ceasefire everyone signed and immediately bombed through.
All square. Even Spain and Argentina can't say that until Sunday.
The only thing that resolved itself peacefully this week.
youOwe: Less than a Taco Bell order. At least yours won't give you a parasite.
Gibraltar opened its border after 300 years. You can open Venmo.
Iran's ceasefire lasted longer than your excuse. Think about that.
The ceasefire held two days. Your last payment was two months ago.
That's a World Cup final program and a bad hot dog at MetLife. Own it.
McConnell's posting hospital selfies at 84. You can't post a payment.
Messi once posed with baby Yamal in an ad. He's facing him Sunday. Face this.
Spain and Gibraltar tore down their fence after 300 years. Your excuse has better walls.
Qatar's under Iranian fire. You're under far more reasonable pressure.
Lindsey Graham is gone and this balance remains. Remarkably durable.
That's a scalped World Cup final seat. You should feel shame. Scalpers don't.
The Taco Bell outbreak hit thousands. This balance hits one person: your partner.
Messi is one win from back-to-back titles. You're one payment from basic decency.
You're not splitting expenses anymore. You're financing a geopolitical stance.
Qatar, Kuwait, and Jordan all got hit this week. You're next on the list.
Six straight nights of airstrikes on Iran. Your excuses have run longer.
You've personally sanctioned the Strait of Goodwill. It is fully closed.
No longer a balance. A multilateral problem requiring diplomatic intervention.
theyOwe: Smaller than Taco Bell's legal fees right now. Still yours.
A ghost balance. It haunts. Nobody moves. The ceasefire is fake.
Less than Messi earns per second at the final. Collect it anyway.
They've held this since before the ceasefire that already collapsed.
McConnell posted a hospital selfie at 84. Collect before he does it again.
That's a World Cup watch-party bar tab they ran up. On your name.
Lamine Yamal was literally a baby in Messi's photo. This debt's older.
Enough to fund the CDC's lettuce recall. Demand it before they eat more Taco Bell.
The Strait of Hormuz moves $100 billion in oil daily. This debt moves nothing.
That's a World Cup final seat at MetLife. They owe you the chair and the view.
Qatar is actively under fire and handling it with more grace than this IOU.
The ceasefire held two days before it collapsed. You've held out for weeks.
Messi's chasing his second cup. You're chasing a first acknowledgment.
Dispatch a diplomatic envoy. Qatar's busy, but this warrants the effort.
The US ran six airstrike nights. You've asked twice. Consider escalating.
Bigger than a peace deal, messier than a war, and nobody's calling a ceasefire.
Spain opened a 300-year-old border. Your partner won't open their banking app.
This is now a full economic crisis. The IMF has been notified. In spirit.
